mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_legal_improvement WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE col_status WHEN 'register' THEN 0 WHEN 'progress' THEN 1 WHEN 'review' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, CASE priority WHEN 'high' THEN 0 WHEN 'mid' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, target_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_legal_improvement WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_improvement WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_improvement WHERE deleted = 0 AND col_status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_legal_improvement ( improvement_type, priority, title, base_law, description, dept, owner_name, target_date, source, col_status, registered_date, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{improvementType}, #{priority}, #{title}, #{baseLaw}, #{description}, #{dept}, #{ownerName}, #{targetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{source}, #{colStatus}'register', #{registeredDate,jdbcType=DATE}CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE), 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_legal_improvement SET improvement_type = #{improvementType}, priority = #{priority}, title = #{title}, base_law = #{baseLaw}, description = #{description}, dept = #{dept}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, target_date = #{targetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, source = #{source}, col_status = #{colStatus}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_legal_improvement SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
